title: Under 5 minutes to a deployed LLM endpoint — Audry Hsu, RunPod
summary: RunPod is a cloud platform enabling deployment of LLM endpoints in under five minutes on H100 GPUs with serverless, pay-per-request pricing. Founded from repurposed crypto mining rigs, it now serves 500,000 developers with $120 million annual recurring revenue and supports rapid model deployment from model hubs.
